result.stdout:
[ERROR] Must specify an expression or code (variable `arg` contains standard input)


cs - An unix cli tool to execute arbitrary CSharp code
Usage:
cs <csharp code>

Example:
cat cs.csproj |  cs "var x = 10; Echo(x + arg.Split('<')[1]);"

(Echo is an alias to Console.WriteLine)
